description: A single-column article layout for story/content detail pages. Includes a metadata bar (back link, date, category, read time), main heading, lead paragraph, body content with subheadings, inline images, video embeds, pull quotes, and reference footnotes.

FR-01.title: Article Metadata Bar
FR-01.description: The article MUST display a metadata bar above the main heading.
acceptance: Back link: 'All Stories' (links to stories hub)
Publication date in format 'Month DD, YYYY'

FR-02.title: Article Title (H1)
FR-02.description: The article MUST display a prominent H1 title.
acceptance: F37 Lineca Medium, 64px desktop, 40px tablet, 30px mobile

FR-03.title: Lead Paragraph
FR-03.description: The article SHOULD display a lead/intro paragraph with slightly larger or distinguished styling.
acceptance: May use cmp-text-x-large or cmp-text-xx-large variant

FR-04.title: Body Content
FR-04.description: The article MUST support rich body content including paragraphs, subheadings, lists, and inline formatting.
acceptance: Subheadings: H5 for section breaks (F37 Lineca Medium, 28px)
Bold and italic inline formatting supported

FR-05.title: Inline Images
FR-05.description: The article MUST support inline images within the body content.
acceptance: Images displayed at article body width (~640px)

FR-06.title: Inline Video Embed
FR-06.description: The article MUST support inline video embeds (Brightcove/YouTube).

FR-07.title: Pull Quote
FR-07.description: The article MUST support pull quotes (see B19) inline within the body content.

FR-08.title: Reference Footnotes
FR-08.description: The article SHOULD support numbered footnotes with superscript references in the body text.
acceptance: Superscript numbers in body text link to footnote section
Footnote section at bottom of article with numbered references
References may link to external sources

FR-09.title: Responsive Typography
FR-09.description: Article typography MUST scale across breakpoints.

accessibility.AC-01: Article MUST have proper heading hierarchy (H1 > H5 for subheadings)
accessibility.AC-02: Images MUST have meaningful alt text
accessibility.AC-03: Footnote links MUST be bidirectional (body to footnote and back)
accessibility.AC-04: Reading time and metadata SHOULD be available to screen readers
